mapper.select: { CALL sonictmsdev_mssql..USP_COMM_M_EASY_SAVE ( #{saveGubn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tblCommMId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{commCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{commNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{commDesc ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comdCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comdNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comdDesc ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
